title: Boostify
description: This Minecraft modpack is designed to significantly boost frame rates, especially on low-end PCs. It includes a curated selection of essential mods aimed at enhancing performance, ensuring smooth gameplay across all devices. The modpack is light-weight
body:
---

### **🚀 Boostify: The Pinnacle of Minecraft Performance**  

#### **The Ultimate FPS-Boosting Modpack for Smooth, Lag-Free Gameplay**  

Formerly known as **Really Optimized**, **Boostify** delivers the **fastest, smoothest, and most visually stunning** Minecraft experience. Say goodbye to **lag, stutters, and slow chunk loading**—this is **Minecraft, fully unleashed**.  

🔹 **Higher FPS** 🔹 **Faster World Loading** 🔹 **No Visual Compromises**  

---

### **🔥 Why Choose Boostify?**  

✅ **Unmatched Performance 🚀** – Experience **supersonic frame rates** and ultra-responsive gameplay, even in the most demanding situations.  

✅ **Instant World Loading ⚡** – Load into worlds in **seconds**, without lag or frustrating stutters.  

✅ **Optimized for Low-End PCs 💻** – Runs smoothly on **all systems**, from budget laptops to high-end setups.  

✅ **Vanilla-Friendly Enhancements 🎨** – Enjoy **stunning visuals** while keeping Minecraft’s **original feel intact**.  

✅ **Easy Installation & Seamless Compatibility 🔧** – Download from **Modrinth** and start playing instantly—no complicated setup required.  

---

### **🎮 Best Video Settings for FPS**  

| **Setting**           | **💎 High Graphics (Best Visuals, Lower FPS)** | **⚖️ Recommended (Balanced Performance)** | **⚡ Maximum FPS (For Low-End PCs)** |
|----------------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|
| **Graphics**        | Fancy / Fabulous | Fast | Fast |
| **Render Distance** | 12-16 Chunks | 8-10 Chunks | 4-6 Chunks |
| **Simulation Distance** | 8+ Chunks | 6 Chunks | 4 Chunks |
| **Smooth Lighting** | Maximum | Minimum | Off |
| **Dynamic Lights** | Fancy | Fast | Off |
| **Shadows** | On | Off | Off |
| **Particles** | All | Decreased | Minimal |
| **V-Sync** | On | Off | Off |
| **Max Framerate** | 120 FPS | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| **Entity Distance** | 100% | 75% | 50% |
| **Clouds** | Fancy | Fast | Off |
| **Mipmap Levels** | 4 (Max) | 2 | 0 (Off) |
| **Biome Blend** | 15x15 | 5x5 | Off |
| **Fullscreen** | On | On | On |
| **FOV Effects & Distortion** | 100% | 75% | 50% |

---

<details>  
<summary>📌 Click to expand: Extra Optimization Tips ⬇️</summary>  

### **💡 Pro Tips for Maximum FPS**  
✔ **Allocate 6-8GB RAM (Modded) or 4-6GB (Vanilla)**  
✔ **Close background apps (Chrome, Discord, etc.)**  
✔ **Use Low-Resolution Texture Packs (16x or 8x)**  
✔ **Update GPU Drivers Regularly**  
✔ **Enable Performance-Boosting Mods in Boostify**  

</details>  

---

### **🌐 Compatibility & Installation**  

🔹 **Supports [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) & [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)** & Now in **[NeoForge](https://neoforged.net)**

🔹 Works on the **latest** Minecraft versions  
🔹 **Modrinth Exclusive** – Download & install with just one click!  

🎯 **Inspired by [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably), but even better!**  

💬 **Need help?** Join our **[Discord](https://discord.gg/HAWU8FDsyx)** for support and updates!
